name: StringList
summary: The StringList class defines a type safe string collection.

constructors.name: StringList
constructors.summary: Creates a new string list instance.

constructors.name: StringList
constructors.summary: Creates a new string list instance with the given capacity.

methods.name: Add
methods.summary: Adds a new string to the end of the string list.

methods.name: Contains
methods.summary: Checks if the string is in the list.

methods.name: GetRange
methods.summary: Gets a part of the string list.

methods.name: IndexOf(String)
methods.summary: Gets the index of the specified string.

methods.name: IndexOf(String, Int32)
methods.summary: Gets the index of the specified string between the index to start the search from and the end of the list.

methods.name: IndexOf(String, Int32, Int32)
methods.summary: Gets the index of the specified string between the index to start the search from and startIndex + count.

methods.name: Insert
methods.summary: Inserts the string to the specified index.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

methods.name: LastIndexOf(String)
methods.summary: Searches for the last occurence of the string in the list.

methods.name: LastIndexOf(String, Int32)
methods.summary: Searches for the last occurence of the string in the list.

methods.name: LastIndexOf(String, Int32, Int32)
methods.summary: Searches for the last occurence of the string in the list.

methods.name: Remove
methods.summary: Removes the first occurence of the string from the list.

methods.name: RemoveRange
methods.summary: Removes a range of items starting from the given index.

methods.name: ToArray
methods.summary: Copies the strings to a string array.

properties.name: Item
properties.summary: Gets or sets the string at the specified index.
